title: OneMace

body:
OneMace – The Ultimate Single Mace Experience

Description:
OneMace is a unique Minecraft plugin that introduces a single, powerful mace into your server. Only one One Mace can exist at a time, making it a coveted item for players to craft, find, and fight over.

With OneMace, you can:

Track the Mace – Locate it whether it’s held by a player, in an Ender Chest, or dropped in the world.

Purchase a Mace Finder Compass – Point directly to the mace for a limited time.

View Mace History – See who crafted it, who picked it up, and all major events.

Admin Controls – Reset or reload the system easily.

Perfect for survival servers, PvP arenas, or competitive gameplay, OneMace adds tension, strategy, and excitement every time the One Mace changes hands.

Key Features:

Only one One Mace exists at a time.

Real-time tracking and finder compass.

Detailed ownership and event history.

Admin-friendly commands for reset and reload.

Lightweight, reliable, and easy to configure.

Bring competition, adventure, and fun to your server with OneMace — the ultimate chase for the legendary weapon!
